'''Galand''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core world]]. It was [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[near-Human]] [[Galandan]]s, including the religious martyr [[H'kig (religious leader)|H'kig]]. His teachings formed the basis of the [[H'kig]] philosophy. To escape persecution, the H'kig fled to distant [[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]].

Galand was girdled with endless equatorial roadways.<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
